Trigger/Action: TRIGGER: New prospect identified OR Engagement drop detected OR Event attendance OR Content consumption
Tool/System: CRM / Lead database / Intent data provider / Event platform

Trigger/Action: Build target prospect list from ICP criteria, intent signals, technographics, firmographics
Tool/System: ICP filters / ZoomInfo / Clearbit / 6sense / Bombora / LinkedIn Sales Navigator
Data_Fields: company_name, industry, company_size, revenue, technologies, employee_count

Trigger/Action: Enrich prospect data (email, phone, social profiles, company info, buying signals)
Tool/System: Data enrichment APIs (Clearbit, ZoomInfo, Apollo, Lusha)
Data_Fields: email, phone, linkedin_url, job_title, decision_maker_level, reporting_structure

Trigger/Action: Create personalized outreach sequence across multiple channels (email, LinkedIn, phone, direct mail)
Tool/System: Sales engagement platform (Outreach, Salesloft, Apollo, Reply.io)

Trigger/Action: Launch multi-touch cadence (typically 8-12 touchpoints over 2-3 weeks)
Tool/System: Multi-channel sequencer / Cadence templates / Automation engine

Trigger/Action: Track engagement across all channels (email opens, LinkedIn profile views, call connects, replies)
Tool/System: Email tracking / LinkedIn engagement / Call logging / Multi-touch attribution
Data_Fields: opens_count, clicks_count, linkedin_views, call_attempts, call_connects, replies

Trigger/Action: Use AI to personalize messaging based on prospect behavior and company research
Tool/System: AI writing assistant (Lavender, Jasper) / Personalization at scale / GPT-4

Trigger/Action: DECISION: Positive response received (reply, meeting booked, content download)?
Tool/System: Reply detection / Meeting scheduling (Calendly, Chili Piper)

Trigger/Action: IF YES: Move to sales conversation workflow + notify sales rep + log opportunity
Tool/System: CRM opportunity creation / Sales alert / Pipeline tracking

Trigger/Action: IF NO: Continue sequence OR try different angle/channel
Tool/System: Sequence branching logic / A/B testing / Channel rotation

Trigger/Action: Monitor for buying signals (job changes, funding, tech stack changes, hiring, intent keywords)
Tool/System: Intent data monitoring / Job change alerts / Funding alerts / Tech install signals

Trigger/Action: Auto-pause outreach if prospect shows negative engagement (unsubscribe, "not interested" reply)
Tool/System: Unsubscribe processing / Negative reply detection / Do-not-contact list

Trigger/Action: Re-engage cold prospects with new campaigns when timing/circumstances change
Tool/System: Re-engagement campaigns / Timing triggers / New angle testing

Trigger/Action: Measure outreach effectiveness (response rate, meeting rate, pipeline generated, ROI by channel)
Tool/System: Sales analytics platform / Pipeline attribution / Channel performance dashboard
